source_columns: feature_file,pump_index,symbol,date + pump_telegram source row ordinal via nearest event join
notes: All checked positive feature rows join to a Binance pump event within 180 seconds, but the native feature key is a build-local pump_index rather than an immutable upstream event id.
Feature timestamps are UTC exchange windows; market session is crypto 24x7 and window size is encoded as 5S, 15S, or 25S.
Feature rows carry symbols; source event table and README constrain the checked labeled feature package to Binance SYM/BTC crypto pairs.
gt=1/gt=0 supports a direct pump/dump species package only; it is not a spoofing/layering, quote-stuffing, pinging, bear-raid, or painting-tape label source.
Each positive pump_index has same-schema gt=0 rows in the same feature file and event window group.

source_columns: source commit plus SHA256 of source CSV/GZ files
notes: The artifact records compact source hashes only; raw rows stay in /tmp.
No order-book layering/spoofing lifecycle labels are present in this source package.
The package covers pump/dump only and does not cover quote stuffing, pinging, bear raid, or painting tape.
